strengths: Demonstrated proper needle loading and driving technique through the Penrose drain
Successfully executed multiple extracorporeal knot throws with good hand coordination
Maintained steady instrument control throughout the suturing process
weaknesses: Failed to complete the task within the 7-minute time limit
Spent excessive time on knot tying sequence without progressing to final suture cutting
Did not efficiently transition from knot completion to suture trimming phase

drills.name: Timed completion sequence drill
drills.description: Practice the complete task from needle pass through final suture cut in 5-minute intervals, focusing on smooth transitions between phases.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete task within time limit

drills.name: Knot-to-cut transition practice
drills.description: After securing each knot, immediately practice identifying optimal cutting length and executing clean suture cuts without hesitation.
drills.targets_weakness: Did not efficiently transition to suture trimming

drills.name: Economy-of-motion knot tying
drills.description: Perform knot sequences with minimal hand repositioning, emphasizing efficient throw completion over perfect technique.
drills.targets_weakness: Excessive time on knot tying sequence

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your solid technical skills into faster task completion. Your suturing technique is sound, but you need to develop time awareness and efficient phase transitions to consistently finish within the benchmark.
